title: OurAirports open data downloads
notes: Use only public civil/reference records in the default dataset. Military-only, tactical, or operationally sensitive rows require maintainer review before publication.

title: UN/LOCODE Code List
license: UNECE UN/LOCODE public code list; redistribution review required
notes: Primary official source. Review current edition licensing and attribution before importing canonical records.

title: DataHub UN/LOCODE codelist
notes: Convenience mirror of UNECE UN/LOCODE data. Prefer cross-checking against the official UNECE page before release.

title: Wikidata
notes: Use for public identifiers and cross-checking, not as the only source for sensitive or ambiguous transport locations.

title: GeoNames Syrian Arab Republic Gazetteer Extract
notes: Useful for cross-checking coordinates and names against the geography dataset.

title: OpenSyria Data Geography
license: OpenSyria dataset compilation; upstream source licenses apply
notes: Used to cross-link transport records to reviewed OpenSyria geography localities. Do not use locality names as facility names unless the transport record itself represents that locality.

title: Border Crossings, Syria, March 2014
notes: Compiled by the U.S. Department of State Humanitarian Information Unit and mirrored by Stanford/UC Berkeley GeoData. Use as stable public reference data only; do not infer live crossing status.

title: Syria Border Crossings (HDX, 2015)
notes: Archived HDX mirror of U.S. Department of State Humanitarian Information Unit border crossing data. Use as stable public reference data only; do not infer live crossing status.
